NAVAREA XIX 27/25
 1. ANDOYA SPACE WILL LAUNCH ONE ROCKET FROM NORMELA IN NORTH WESTERLY DIRECTION
 SCHEDULED 1130 TO 1430 UTC DAILY FROM 20 MAR TO 29 MAR.
 AND 1030 TO 1230 UTC 30 MAR.  
   
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING AREAS
  
 HAZARD AREA UPRANGE
 A. 70-30.78N 014-58.38E
 B. 69-10.29N 015-51.19E
 C. 69-00.23N 015-24.85E
 D. 70-28.46N 013-59.67E
  
 HAZARD AREA DOWN RANGE
 A. 70-25.10N 012-46.34E
 B. 70-32.80N 015-57.86E
 C. 82-22.22N 007-34.00E
 D. 81-49.68N 011-12.97E
  
 NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS 5/25 REEFERS
 2. CANCEL THIS WARNING 301230UTC MAR 25.   NAVAREA XIX 27/25
